name: abab5.5 / abab5.5s
tagline: MiniMax's 2023 production chat models that powered its early assistant and companion apps.
metaDescription: MiniMax abab5.5 and abab5.5s were the lab's 2023 production chat models, with 16,384- and 8,192-token limits, powering its early assistants and companion apps.
overview: abab5.5 and abab5.5s are MiniMax's 2023 production-grade chat models, part of the abab family that the company opened to the public after its self-developed MiniMax-abab model passed China's first batch of large-model service filings in August 2023. They served as the workhorse text models behind MiniMax's early assistant and companion experiences before the abab6 and abab6.5 generations arrived.

abab5.5-chat supported a combined input-plus-output limit of 16,384 tokens, while abab5.5s-chat was a smaller, lighter variant with an 8,192-token limit aimed at faster, lower-cost interactions. Both were proprietary, API-served models rather than open-weight releases.

As the earliest abab generation tracked here, abab5.5 marks the start of MiniMax's publicly documented model lineage that later scaled up to the 100B+ MoE abab6 and the trillion-parameter abab6.5 series. The abab5.5 models have since been retired; this page preserves them as the foundation of the legacy abab line.
strengths: Among MiniMax's first publicly available production chat models
Two tiers: abab5.5 for quality, lighter abab5.5s for speed and cost
Powered MiniMax's early assistant and companion applications
Passed China's first batch of large-model service filings in 2023
useCases: Conversational assistants and companion-style chat apps
General Chinese-language text generation and dialogue
Early API-based application prototyping on MiniMax

faq.a: They are MiniMax's 2023 production chat models in the abab family. abab5.5 is the standard model and abab5.5s is a smaller, lighter variant tuned for faster, lower-cost responses.
abab5.5-chat supported a combined input-plus-output limit of 16,384 tokens, while the lighter abab5.5s-chat supported 8,192 tokens.

faq.q: Were the abab5.5 models open weights?
faq.a: No. They were proprietary, API-only models served through MiniMax's platform, not released as downloadable weights.

faq.q: Where do abab5.5 models fit in MiniMax's history?
faq.a: abab5.5 was part of the abab family MiniMax opened to the public in 2023 after passing China's first batch of large-model service filings. It preceded the 100B+ MoE abab6 (early 2024) and the trillion-parameter abab6.5 series (April 2024).
